scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/shell" "npm run dev -w apps/product" "npm run dev -w apps/cart"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/ui-kit && npm run build -w apps/product && npm run build -w apps/cart && npm run build -w apps/shell
scripts.start: concurrently "npm start -w apps/shell" "npm start -w apps/product" "npm start -w apps/cart"
